④ RAZORPAY PAYMENT LINK
PAYMENT LINK *
Get from: Razorpay Dashboard → Payment Links → Copy Link
📋 How to Create Razorpay Link:
1️⃣ Login → razorpay.com/dashboard
2️⃣ Go to Payment Links → Create Payment Link
3️⃣ Set amount = ₹?, name = package name
4️⃣ Copy the short link (rzp.io/…)
5️⃣ Paste above ↑
